csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEditor; public class Script { public static string Main() { string result = ""; string[] colors = {"Red","Blue","Green","Yellow","Pink","Purple","Orange","Cyan"}; string tilesFolder = "Assets/Prefabs/Tiles"; if (!AssetDatabase.IsValidFolder(tilesFolder)) { if (!AssetDatabase.IsValidFolder("Assets/Prefabs")) AssetDatabase.CreateFolder("Assets", "Prefabs"); AssetDatabase.CreateFolder("Assets/Prefabs", "Tiles"); } for (int i = 0; i < colors.Length; i++) { string path = tilesFolder + "/Tile_" + colors[i] + ".prefab"; if (AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(path) != null) { result += colors[i] + " exists | "; continue; } var go = new GameObject("Tile_" + colors[i]); var sr = go.AddComponent<SpriteRenderer>(); sr.sortingLayerName = "Default"; sr.sortingOrder = 1; var col = go.AddComponent<BoxCollider2D>(); col.isTrigger = true; col.size = new Vector2(0.9f, 0.9f); PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(go, path); Object.DestroyImmediate(go); result += colors[i] + " created | "; } AssetDatabase.Refresh(); return result; } }
